ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the district is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the restaurant */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the restaurant was added */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the restaurant is located */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the restaurant is located */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine offered by the restaurant */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant where the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant that offers the menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "menu_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu category of the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_menu_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_category_id") REFERENCES menu_categories ("menu_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "menu_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_categories" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "menu_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "menu_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant that uploaded the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant associated with the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_added" (
  "date_added_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date added */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant that was added */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the restaurant was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_added_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_added_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_restaurants" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants_cities" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants_districts" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_item_toppings" (
  "order_item_topping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item topping */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item */,
  "topping_name" TEXT /* Name of the topping */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the topping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_topping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_item_toppings_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
